headline: Iran tensions test China's diplomatic balance, domestic consumption push lifts markets
headline_zh: 伊朗核紧张考验中国外交，国内消费刺激提振市场
narrative: Iran's nuclear standoff escalates as Israel hints at military action and Tehran insists on domestic dilution of enriched uranium. China, a key interlocutor and oil buyer, faces pressure to mediate without alienating either side. Meanwhile, Beijing launches a fresh domestic stimulus wave: eight ministries promote railway-tourism integration to boost service consumption, while MOFCOM announces antidumping duties and export controls. The SSE Composite gains 1.12%, and the yuan firms slightly, reflecting relief from policy activism. But beneath the surface, trade friction with the U.S. persists, as another antidumping ruling hits Chinese fiberglass door panels.
narrative_zh: 伊朗核僵局升级，以色列暗示动武，德黑兰坚持在本国稀释浓缩铀。中国作为关键对话方和石油买家，面临调解压力，需避免疏远任何一方。与此同时，北京推出新一轮国内刺激：八部门推动铁路旅游融合促进服务消费，商务部宣布反倾销税和出口管制。上证综指上涨1.12%，人民币小幅走强，反映政策活跃带来的宽慰。但表面之下，中美贸易摩擦持续，又一反倾销裁决打击中国玻璃纤维门板。
market_snapshot: SSE Composite 4031.51 ▲1.12% · Shenzhen Component 14963.4 ▲0.75% · ChiNext 3830.353 ▲0.50% · USD/CNY 6.7621 ▼0.19% · USD/CNH 6.76 ▼0.04%
